description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds Monero across multiple platforms and toolchains on push and pull request events, excluding documentation and README changes. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to run a job for each toolchain, including RISCV 64bit, ARM v7, ARM v8, i686 Win, i686 Linux, Win64, x86_64 Linux, Cross-Mac x86_64, Cross-Mac aarch64, x86_64 Freebsd, ARMv7 Android, and ARMv8 Android. For each job, check out the repository, set up ccache, install dependencies, and build the project using make depends.
